channel.title: Awesome Search KG
channel.description: Last 10 notes on Awesome Search KG

item.title: Doug Turnbull
item.description: Doug Turnbull Co-founder of OpenSource Connections (OSC); co-author of Relevant Search (O’Reilly).

item.title: Amazon OpenSearch Service now offers AI-assisted migrations
item.description: Amazon OpenSearch Service now offers AI-assisted migrations Amazon Web Services announcement: Migration Assistant for Amazon OpenSearch Service now includes an AI-assisted experience that simplifies moving self-managed Solr, Elasticsearch, or OpenSearch deployments to OpenSearch Serverless or Manage...

item.title: How I learned Vespa by thinking in Solr
item.description: How I learned Vespa by thinking in Solr Sujit Pal (Technology Research Director, Elsevier Labs) documents how he flattened Vespa’s notoriously steep learning curve by mapping each Solr operation onto its Vespa equivalent.

item.title: Amazon Web Services
item.description: Amazon Web Services Amazon’s cloud platform.

item.title: Elsevier
item.description: Elsevier Global academic-publishing and information-analytics company.

item.title: Sujit Pal
item.description: Sujit Pal Technology Research Director at Elsevier Labs, the advanced-technology group within Elsevier.

item.title: Apache Solr
item.description: Apache Solr Mature open-source enterprise search platform built on Apache Lucene.

item.title: Migration between Search Engines
item.description: Migration between Search Engines Moving a production search workload from one engine to another — Solr / Elasticsearch / OpenSearch / Vespa — is a recurring, high-risk theme in search engineering.

item.title: All about Information Retrieval & Search
item.description: Awesome Search — Information Retrieval & Search Knowledge Graph Hello, I am Andrew.

item.title: Vinted - Migrating Search from Elasticsearch to Vespa
item.description: Vinted — Migrating Search from Elasticsearch to Vespa Field report from “Search Scaling Chapter 8: Goodbye Elasticsearch, Hello Vespa Search Engine” (Ernestas Poškus, Vinted Engineering, 2024-09-05).
